data.title: UK minister backs universal basic income amid devastating AI job losses
data.description:
UK's officials are having conversations about bringing in a universal basic income scheme to help workers whose jobs may disappear because of AI.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uk-minister-universal-basic-income/

data.title: Bitget TradFi has been upgraded with the addition of core modules such as profit and loss details and leverage alerts.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has made several optimizations to its TradFi product to comprehensively improve user trading transparency and decision-making efficiency. The upgrades primarily include: Added leverage indicators: providing information on available leverage and optimizing position planning and strategy configuration; Added overnight interest rate indicators: transparently displaying holding costs to help calculate expected returns; Estimated margin indicators for opening positions: providing real-time feedback on capital usage and improving decision-making efficiency; Added a profit and loss details page: clarifying profit and loss analysis and assisting in asset review.

data.title: Investor Shifts Focus from Bitcoin to Ethereum with Leveraged Positions
data.description:
Investor Huang Licheng has closed his Bitcoin long positions, previously valued at approximately $1. 847 million, and redirected his funds into Ethereum long positions, acquiring around 1,200 ETH. According to ChainCatcher, this strategic move has increased his total leveraged Ethereum long position to approximately $28. 878 million, with an average price reduced to $2,977
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/35729639814594?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Gold Prices May Surpass $7,000, Says Peter Schiff
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that prominent gold advocate Peter Schiff has predicted that gold prices could exceed $7,000. This statement comes after a significant single-day increase in gold's market value, nearly rivaling that of Bitcoin, sparking considerable debate about future market trends. In a recent interview, Schiff reiterated his bullish stance on gold, emphasizing its potential in the current macroeconomic environment.

data.title: Web3 Projects Urged to Enhance Transparency on RootData
data.description:
Web3 asset data platform RootData has issued a transparency alert on Twitter (X), highlighting concerns over the funding information of projects such as Netswap, Hydranet, Ubeswap, Omega, and Solidly Labs. According to ChainCatcher, RootData is urging these projects to submit or update their information on its platform to improve their transparency scores. RootData has committed to continuously monitoring and exposing 'black box' projects that lack essential information.

RootData's transparency score is designed to assess the completeness and timeliness of a project's information disclosure. The score ranges from A to F, with lower scores indicating less comprehensive information disclosure and higher risks of misconduct. Investors are advised to exercise caution with projects that have lower transparency scores.

data.title: Commerzbank: The Federal Reserve is in no hurry to cut interest rates further.
data.description: Commerzbank economist Christoph Barz noted in a report that the Federal Reserve is in no hurry to cut interest rates further, given the more favorable economic and labor market conditions. Barz stated that although job growth remains weak, the unemployment rate has shown signs of stabilizing. Taken together, this suggests that monetary policy is no longer restrictive; while a rate cut might have been necessary, current interest rates are closer to the high end of the neutral rate range. "Powell may end his term as chairman in May, and the Fed may not decide to cut rates again during that period," Barz said. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate's stock trading section will launch perpetual contracts for companies such as MSFT (Microsoft), IBM, INTC (Intel), MCD (McDonald's), CSCO (Cisco), and ASML (ASML).
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate.com's stock trading zone will launch live trading (USDT settlement) for perpetual contracts of MSFT (Microsoft), IBM, INTC (Intel), MCD (McDonald's), CSCO (Cisco), ASML (ASML), LLY (Eli Lilly), MRVL (Merlin Technologies), UNH (United Health Group), and ARM (Arm) on January 29th at 19:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage of 1-20 times.

data.title: Investor Shifts Focus from Bitcoin to Ethereum with Leveraged Positions
data.description: Investor Huang Licheng has closed his Bitcoin long positions, previously valued at approximately $1.847 million, and redirected his funds into Ethereum long positions, acquiring around 1,200 ETH. According to ChainCatcher, this strategic move has increased his total leveraged Ethereum long position to approximately $28.878 million, with an average price reduced to $2,977. Currently, there is an unrealized loss of about $300,300. Additionally, Huang holds a leveraged position in HYPE with a total value of around $1.09 million.

data.title: Standard Chartered Predicts $500 Billion Shift to Stablecoins by 2028
data.description:
Crypto KOL Bitwu.ETH posted on X that Standard Chartered's research report estimates that by 2028, approximately $500 billion in cash will transition from bank deposits to stablecoins. This shift is equivalent to 1% of the total deposits in high-risk countries such as Egypt, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Turkey, India, and Kenya. The report suggests that this could significantly impact banks in the coming years.

Historically, bank deposits have been stable due to their role as a safe haven for funds, a payment hub, and a credit intermediary. However, stablecoins are increasingly dismantling the first two roles, with more cross-border settlements, on-chain transactions, and over-the-counter clearings bypassing traditional banking systems.

Regional banks like Huntington Bancshares and M&T Bank, which rely heavily on net interest margins for over 60% of their revenue, are at a disadvantage compared to diversified banks like JPMorgan Chase and Citigroup. These regional banks leverage low-cost deposits to drive asset returns. A loss of deposits could directly increase banks' risk exposure, making liabilities more expensive and unstable.

While the impact of deposit loss may not be evident during high-interest rate cycles, it could become pronounced during periods of narrowing interest rate spreads, potentially leading to bank runs.

data.title: StandX gold and silver contracts were launched simultaneously, with 24-hour trading volume exceeding $1 billion.
data.description: StandX has officially launched perpetual trading for gold and silver, further enriching its trading ecosystem using $DUSD as margin. Users can enjoy native margin returns while holding precious metals. Meanwhile, the introduction of maker points and maker uptime activities has significantly improved StandX's market depth and trading volume. The BTC market depth reached 800 BTC at 10bps (10 basis points), and the 24-hour trading volume exceeded $1 billion.

data.description:

data.title: AI's Impact on Business Strategy and Individual Skills
data.description: Jack Kong, CEO of Nano Labs, posted on X. AI has made execution more affordable, but strategic choices have become more valuable. In businesses, the competitive edge is shifting from execution to vision, while for individuals, it is moving from skills to judgment and taste. This trend is particularly evident in the Web3 and cryptocurrency sectors, where the technical barriers to implementation have lowered. However, the ability to judge trends and allocate assets effectively has become a core competency. What can be easily replicated is no longer scarce; unique insights are now the true assets.

data.title: PANews Seeks Remote Operations Intern
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) announcing a vacancy for a remote operations intern position. The role involves assisting in managing various social media accounts, including X, Xiaohongshu, Video Accounts, and BN Square. Responsibilities include video editing, content creation, publishing, and performance monitoring. The intern will track blockchain and crypto industry trends, assist in news gathering, translation, and basic editing. Additionally, the role includes community interaction management, responding to user comments, and enhancing account engagement and follower loyalty. The intern will also support the planning and execution of online events such as AMAs and themed activities, and assist with other operations-related tasks like community outreach and data organization. Interested candidates are encouraged to send their resumes to jeffrey@panony.com with the email subject line: [Application for Operations Intern] + Name + School.

data.title: Gate Alpha is launching its 152nd points airdrop; holders of the corresponding points can be among the first to claim 0.45, 1, or 2 GT.
data.description: According to official news, Gate Alpha will launch its 152nd GT points airdrop on January 29th at 17:00 (UTC+8). This airdrop will use a tiered airdrop model with high, medium, and low tiers. Users holding 136 ≤ Gate Alpha points ≤ 159 can receive 0.45 GT airdrop tokens, consuming 11 Gate Alpha points; users holding 160 ≤ Gate Alpha points ≤ 182 can receive 1 GT airdrop token, consuming 13 Gate Alpha points; and users holding ≥ 183 Gate Alpha points can receive 2 GT airdrop tokens, consuming 14 Gate Alpha points. Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, Gate Layer, BNB Chain, Base, SUI, ARB, World Chain, AVAX, Polygon, LINEA, ZK, OP, and Berachain. It also enables seamless trading of tokens across the entire chain through the contract address search function, opening up cross-chain transaction links and making all on-chain tokens available with a single click.

data.title: Bitcoin: Liquidity is the New King of Institutional Adoption
data.description:
Volatility no longer scares institutions: the real risk is liquidity. This is why market depth, ETFs and stablecoins are deciding the future of Bitcoin.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/bitcoin-liquidity-is-the-new-king-of-institutional-adoption/

data.title: Institutions: Real interest rates remain high, potentially providing a basis for the Federal Reserve to cut rates in the near future.
data.description: In a report, Scott Helfstein, head of investment strategy at Global X, noted that real interest rates may still be too high, potentially prompting the Federal Reserve to cut rates again soon. "This leads us to believe that the Fed may remain more dovish than the market expects and cut rates again as early as the first quarter," he said. Helfstein believes the current market is likely driven by fundamentals, and the earnings season so far has met high expectations, with many companies reiterating their guidance. (Jinshi)
